title: bridge-teams: teams_security_token not validated as base64 at startup
description: bridge-teams/src/config.rs validate(): only checks that teams_security_token is non-empty, not that it is valid base64. verify_teams_signature() calls B64.decode(security_token) on every inbound request and returns Err if the token is invalid base64. Result: a misconfigured token is silently accepted at startup; every Teams webhook receives a 401 with a confusing 'invalid security_token base64' error at runtime rather than a clear startup failure. Fix: add B64.decode(self.teams_security_token).is_ok() check in validate().
